reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, lastima que no está habilitada la app YPF.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, it's a shame the YPF app isn't available.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfdFBmdHpBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente servicio el de esta ACA. La gente del playón y del negocio siempre predispuestos.
Venden productos locales como quesos y salames. Tienen quesos de la abadia benedictina.
Si andas con tiempo en el restaurant tienen un menú fijo de carne que es excelente.

(Translated by Google)
The service at this ACA is excellent. The staff at the parking lot and in the store are always helpful. They sell local products like cheeses and salamis. They also have cheeses from the Benedictine abbey. If you have time, the restaurant has a set meat menu that's excellent.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfeEtELWJBEAE

reviews.comment:
Es una YPF con Shop como todas, pero son muy amables al atender.

(Translated by Google)
It's a YPF with a shop like all the others, but they are very friendly when serving customers.

reviews.comment:
El parque de atrás está muy descuidado. No tienen personal de seguridad. La atención es mala. Todo puede mejorar

(Translated by Google)
The park in the back is very neglected. They don't have security personnel. The service is poor. Everything can be improved.

reviews.comment:
Dispone de los servicios básicos  esperables en un establecimiento asi. Los baños muy limpios. Pueden adquirirse los recomendables mapas carreteros del ACA.

(Translated by Google)
It has the basic services you'd expect from an establishment like this. The restrooms are very clean. You can buy the recommended ACA road maps.
